advert.description: The Lindt ad features chocolate bunnies and pouring chocolate. It ends at 02:17, transitioning into the Furniture Village ad at 02:18.
The Furniture Village ad shows furniture sales and "Early Birds save". It ends at 02:46 with a sofa sale, transitioning into the Ccs Stop Smoking ad at 02:47.
The Ccs Stop Smoking ad features smokers and NHS branding. It ends at 03:18 with "Smokefree Generation" text, transitioning into the Itvx promo at 03:19.
The itvX promo starts with "MORE MORE MORE" graphics and movie posters, leading into the "Start your 7 day free trial now" screen. It ends at 03:47, transitioning into the Revitive ad at 03:48.
The Revitive circulation booster ad shows seniors using leg massagers and walking with dogs. It ends at 04:17 with partner logos, transitioning into the Co-op Funeral Care ad at 04:18.

The Co-op Funeral Care ad starts with "Under Canvas" furniture imagery (likely irrelevant stock), then shows people talking/funeral counseling. It ends at 04:47 with the Co-op logo, transitioning into the Vax ad at 04:48.

advert.brand: Vauxhall mokka electric by Peugeot motor co
advert.description: The video shows a "VAX CO.UK" vacuum cleaner ad (likely misidentified as Vauxhall in metadata due to naming similarity). It ends at 05:17 with pricing info, transitioning into the "itv1" ident at 05:18.
Inferred as the segment following the Vax ad (05:17) based on sequence. Likely corresponds to the montage period (05:19-05:37) or subsequent clips not clearly detailed.
Inferred as the next segment in the sequence.
Inferred as the next segment in the sequence.
Inferred as the next segment in the sequence.

advert.brand: pilgrims richmond sausages by Pilgrims food group
advert.description: Inferred as the final segment in the sequence.
